generated_oml:
instance AECOBuildingSystem : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Infrastructure within the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain, exemplified by buildings. It integrates static models with real-time operational data to create a virtual representation for simulation, analysis, and optimization across the complete building lifecycle, from initial design to refurbishment and operation, within complex and heterogeneous infrastructure environments."
    base:contains GeometricModel, BehavioralModel, AnalyticalModel, MDEEnabler, VisualizationEnabler, RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService, EnhancedDecisionMakingService
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model derived from Building Information Modeling (BIM) for spatial representation of building components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model capturing control logic and system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model for performance simulation and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering process for automatic generation of deployable DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService, EnhancedDecisionMakingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization interface for real-time synchronization between physical and digital counterparts"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring through data-driven insights for building performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for performance forecasting and maintenance scheduling"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational processes to reduce energy and maintenance costs"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance EnhancedDecisionMakingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making capabilities for stakeholders throughout the building lifecycle"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnhancedDecisionMakingInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights on building performance metrics for facility managers and operators"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights on potential equipment failures and maintenance needs"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for optimizing operational efficiency and cost reduction"
]

instance EnhancedDecisionMakingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights supporting strategic decisions for architects and engineers"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle includes initial device modeling within BIM environment to define sensors, actuators, and controllers; Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) for structured representation extraction and automatic generation of deployable artifacts; real-time data exchange for continuous synchronization between physical and digital counterparts; interactive visualization for monitoring and control; and modular architecture with standardized extension points enabling evolution through custom services integration."
]
